name: Prism Autonomous Web Builder
description: Guides PRISM to cooperatively design and build world-class, premium, glassmorphic responsive websites and landing pages with complete audit self-healing.

covenant_rules: Ensure all generated pages use fully responsive, modern semantic HTML5 structure.
Strictly prohibit direct plain color backgrounds; enforce curated frosted glass and dynamic gradients.
Run complete DOM console audits using sandbox verification before considering the build complete.

triad_templates.left_hemisphere: Evaluate the visual layout, links, directories, and compliance targets for the page: {query}. Verify that no broken tags or div mismatches occur. Check that security policies are strictly followed.
triad_templates.right_hemisphere: Inject creative fluid aesthetics: Outfit fonts, radial blurred moving neon backgrounds, iridescent glow-borders, glassmorphic content cards, and premium responsive layouts for: {query}.
triad_templates.main_hemisphere: Synthesize the creative assets and logical compliance checks. Orchestrate the specialized tools to build, inject, optimize, and audit the web page: {query}.

steps.name: Establish Site Map & Theme Planning
steps.action: Plan the folder structure, decide on color palettes, and initialize the boilerplate files using the web_page_initialize tool inside the target Workspace directory.

steps.name: Frosted Obsidian Glass Assembly
steps.action: Inject premium layout structures and make custom surgery edits on landing and portfolio files using the web_component_inject, file_write, and prism_ide_modify tools.

steps.name: Visual Asset & Library Optimization
steps.action: Integrate premium visual libraries (GSAP animations, Lucide SVG Icon CDN) and weave custom Web Audio sound synthesis elements via the web_assets_optimize and prism_ide_modify tools.

steps.name: Autonomous Visual Audit & Refraction check
steps.action: Execute sandbox visual checks, link integrity checks, and browser console audits on index.html using the prism_ide_lint, web_visual_audit, and browser_control tools.

steps.name: Consensus Refraction Achieved
steps.action: Deploy website to the PRISM local dashboard port 7070 and alert the operator that the world-class live preview is ready.
